results.title: 3 church leaders shot dead in Manipur
results.description: IMPHAL, MAY 13 (PTI/AGENCIES): Three church leaders were killed and four others injured after suspected militants ambushed two vehicles in Manipur’s Kangpokpi district on Wednesday, police said.The incident occurred between Kotzim and Kotlen villages when members of the Thadou Baptist Association (TBA) were returning from Churachandpur after attending a religious congregation.Among those killed were former [...] The post 3 church leaders shot dead in Manipur first appeared on Nagaland Post .
creator: nagapost
results.source_name: Nagaland Post - Get The Latest Nagaland News, Brea
